description: Peer-to-peer file sync (Syncthing-shaped). Distinct from file-storage-v1 (centralised cloud object store) — sync-v1 is symmetric mesh sync between paired devices. First implementer: syncthing-blade-mcp.

operations.description: List all configured sync folders (id, label, path, type, paused state)
operations.name: folder_list

operations.description: Get current sync state for a folder (idle/scanning/syncing, completion %, errors, needed bytes)
operations.name: folder_status

operations.description: List all paired devices (id, name, addresses, connected state, last seen)
operations.name: device_list

operations.description: Get full configuration for a single folder (devices, ignore patterns, versioning)
operations.name: folder_get

operations.description: Get full configuration for a single device
operations.name: device_get

operations.description: Pause sync activity for a folder (configuration retained)
operations.name: folder_pause

operations.description: Resume sync activity for a previously paused folder
operations.name: folder_resume

operations.description: Trigger an immediate rescan of a folder
operations.name: folder_scan

operations.description: Read the ignore patterns (.stignore) for a folder
operations.name: ignore_patterns_get

operations.description: Remove a sync folder from the configuration (does not delete files on disk)
operations.name: folder_remove

operations.description: Pair a new device with this node
operations.name: device_add

operations.description: Unpair a device, revoking its access to shared folders
operations.name: device_remove

title: sync-v1
